function.name: schedule_task
function.arguments:
{"cron_expression":"0 8-20 * * *","task_description":"On creation
validate cron 0 8-20 * * *
validate prompt (check tiktokprompt.md exists + is parseable)
validate output (will be a single codeblock only)
perform a test run (dry-run, won’t post; log result)

On each run (daily 8am to 20pm, channel = current)
read tiktokprompt.md (filepath: tiktokprompt.md, not workspace/tiktokprompt.md
pick a random psychological topic
fill the criteria into tiktokprompt.md inputs
generate the TikTok script from that prompt
format the script inside one codeblock and nothing else
post to this channel
log runtime, success/failure, and basic metadata

If it fails
retry once silently (no chat messages)
if still fails, post a short error in chat with the date + small summary
always write big, noticeable logs with full details"}
